creator: 2khramtsov@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Jan Beich from comment #1)

> This can be improved if I knew where to check when a particular "weekly" will be skipped

Today on server.veloren.net, a group of players (me also) brought Mindflayer from dungeon to the spawn town on airship. Mods (+ Isse dev) who were with us told that tomorrow could be the next server update, which should bring Frost Gigas. Or, *there is a possibility that tomorrow weekly could be skipped*.

Disclaimer: consider my message to be in UTC timezone, for true update plan rather than rumors consider joining upstream Matrix/Discord and inquiring the devs.
